name: INS 316
description: INS316 belongs to the family of drugs called nucleoside triphosphates.It is studied in the diagnosis of lung diseases, including lung cancer. It is selective P2y2 receptor antagonists claimed to be useful as anti-inflammatory agents.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in lung cancer.
mechanismOfAction: INS316 helps to bring up a sample of mucus from deep in the lungs and improves the quality of the sample for testing.
